---
name: Feature Request
about: A new capability, or a test/docs/chore task
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Summary

What you want to add or change, and why.

## Scope

What's in scope for this issue specifically. If this is part of a larger planned
item (see the roadmap in [CONTRACT.md](docs/src/CONTRACT.md) and
[ARCHITECTURE.md](docs/src/ARCHITECTURE.md)), link to that context.

## Proposed approach

Optional. Sketch of how you'd implement it, if you already have one in mind.

## Alternatives considered

Optional. Other approaches and why this one was chosen instead, if relevant.
